name: BB:HostDefinition: VA Scanner Source IP
notes: Edit this BB to include the source IP address of your VA scanner. By default, this BB applies when the source IP address is 127.0.0.2.
bb_references: BB:HostDefinition: VA Scanner Source IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
TD_list: APPLY BB:HostDefinition: VA Scanner Source IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
